steps.title: Solve the system by elimination
steps.content: Multiply the second equation by 4: $16x-4y=76$. Add to $x+4y=-8$: $$17x=68 \Rightarrow x=4,\ y=4(4)-19=-3.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $27$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $27$ is the value to enter.
